snippet.title: BardiyaKo Bagh [Child Version]- Kamal BC Maldai & Aakriti Rai - Mariya Gurung - New Nepali Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kamal BC Maldai Presents:-
BardiyaKo Bagh

--------------------------------------
#BardiyaKoBagh #kamalbcmaldai #KataKata #KamalBC #NepaliSong #NepaliMusic #LokDohori #TrendingNepaliSong #chldversion #aakritirai #bhojpurenani #bhojpureraini

🎶 Audio Credits:- 

♬ Song:- 
Bardiya Ko Bagh

♬ Vocal:-
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai

♬ Lyrics/ Music :- 
Kamal BC Maldai

♬ Music Arranger :- 
Bishwas Nepal

♬ Mix/Mastering :- 
Shyam Swet Rasaili

♬ Studio :- 
Prisma Recording Studio KTM

♬ Audio | Video:- 
Kamal BC Maldai
+977-9851240302
----------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:- 

🎬 Cast :- 
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai
Mariya Gurung

🎬 Director | Cinematographer:- 
Prakash Khadka & Team

🎬 Editor | Colorist:- 
Manoj Karki

🎬 MUA:- 
Sangita Chand Thakuri

BLESSED
MAN BAHADUR BUDHA (FATHER) 
TOPKALA BUDHA  (MOTHER)

SPECIAL THANKS :-
Bijay Rai
Chitra Bahadur Gurung
Manju Gurung
Anjana Gurung
Suk Bahadur Gurung
Amita Gurung
Sanju Gurung
Anju Gurung


--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma


© Kamal BC Maldai, 2026
All Rights Reserved
---------------------------------------------

snippet.description:
Theek saamne, aapko woh play button dikh raha hai? Haan, usse daba dijiye ▶️🚨

Presenting the Official Trailer of “Dhamaal 4” directed by Indra Kumar starring Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh, Jaaved Jaaferi, Ravi Kishan, Sanjay Mishra, Upendra Limaye, Anjali Anand, Sanjeeda Shaikh & Esha Gupta.

Watch the biggest family entertainer #Dhamaal4 in cinemas worldwide from 10th July!

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present
In Association With Devgn Films
A T-Series Films, Maruti International, Panorama Studios Production

"DHAMAAL 4"

Theek saamne, aapko woh play button dikh raha hai? Haan, usse daba dijiye ▶️🚨

Presenting the Official Trailer of “Dhamaal 4” directed by Indra Kumar starring Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh, Jaaved Jaaferi, Ravi Kishan, Sanjay Mishra, Upendra Limaye, Anjali Anand, Sanjeeda Shaikh & Esha Gupta.

Watch the biggest family entertainer #Dhamaal4 in cinemas worldwide from 10th July!

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present
In Association With Devgn Films
A T-Series Films, Maruti International, Panorama Studios Production

"DHAMAAL 4"

Join the madness of Dhamaal 4 and get ready for a laughter riot like never before. Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive offers, updates, & more only on BookMyShow.

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

snippet.title: Mohammad Faiz – Eyes (Official Video) | Starring Akanksha Choudhary
snippet.description:
Eyes is an R&B Trap and Rajasthani Pop song that fuses modern sounds with Rajasthani roots. A story of love, attraction, and the emotions hidden behind a glance, the song captures what words often cannot express. 


Audio Credits :

Singing, composition and Lyrics - Mohammad Faiz 
Music - Hiten
Mix and Master - Hiten
Guitars - Saby
Recording engineer - Mrigank

Starring - Akanksha Choudhary 

Video Credits :

Director - Mohammad Faiz 
DOP, Creative Director - Arshad Khan
First AD - Sahiba Khan
Ad - Shahrukh khan
Editor, DI - Inkblaze Studios
VFX - Harshit 
Producer - Mohammad Faiz 
Project Manager - Prateek Ramawat 
Costume designers - Faiz, Sahiba Khan and FilAishé 
Rajasthani fabrics - Abdulla Fabrics 
LP - Shahrukh khan
Production - Everest Studios
Production manager - Ankur Tanwar
Asst. Production manager - Jatin Aman
Gaffer - Subhash Kumar
Hair - Azrudin 
Make up - Dhanwantari Swami 
BTS - Manoj Ramawat and Kamal khaj
Security - Murli Manohar
Dressman - Jitesh Kumar
Tailor - Udaykant mandal
Spot - Team Kamal
Lights - Light camera aktion and Shreeji lights
Lighting team - Sushil Sahu, Nitish, Raj, Virendar, Hemanth, Ravi and Rahul
Artwork - The Visuals Vague





Lyrics : 

Kai Raatan di tu jagaa
Heartbeat bhi di tu bhaga
Meri zindagi ma ab to
Maalum ha mhane ke laga 
chaand chaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do 
Atto pyaar devagi…

Tane soch, tere liye saaro gaaya jaave shehar
Teri sunke awaaz hi surilo pad gyo
Jaipur na bhi kargi gulabi chhori
Tane dekh saaro jodhpur neelo pad gyo

Koi sachoge bhi koni aiso kaam krdyuń
Tera qadma ka nicha saaro gaam krdyuń
Bol aaj hi miladyuń tana maa sa meri
Mera ghar haali chaabya tera naam krdyuń

Ab koni hova ha sabar
Aake puch la meri khabar
Dil sach mero keva ha agar
Mera har ek birthday par
Uphaar devagi

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Cocktail 2 Official Trailer | Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna | In Cinemas 19th June
snippet.description:
From friends to lovers to CHAOS, the perfect 🍸 is back.

#Cocktail2 In Cinemas 19th June. Trailer Out Now.

Directed By: Homi Adajania
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan, Ankur Garg
Music Director: Pritam
Written by: Tarun Jain, Luv Ranjan
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Story By: Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Production Design: Arvind Ashok Kumar, Bindiya Chhabria
Editor: Akshara Prabhakar
Associate Producers: Sanjeev Mishra, Vineeta Tanwar
Executive Director: Abhishek Kapur
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania
Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
Executive Producers: Shraddha S. Thorat, Roshan Singh
COO & Legal Head: Ashni Parekh
Head of Commercials & Distribution: Poonam Shivdasani
Finance Head: Anuradha Walawalkar
Sound Designer: Anirban Sengupta
Re-Recording Mixer: Rajakrishnan M. R
Associate Director (SICILY): Vikram Dawar
Chief Assistant Director: Priyansh Gabra
O.A.P: Lagnesh Joshi
Script Supervisor: Chitgunn Singh
Director's Assistant: Daani Naidu
Associate Line Producer: Hemant Dubey
Casting By: Panchami Ghavri
Secondary Costume Designer: Akshay Tyagi
Associate Costume Designer: Sukriti Grover
Post Production: The Post Co.
DI: Redefine
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
VFX Producer (Maddock): Kunal Jagdish Sodha
VFX: Squad VFX Pvt Ltd, Astra Studios
Music On: Universal Music
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-One)
Head Brand PR & Social: Sonia Huria
PR: Ritu Devnani (Butterfly Communications)
Local Line Producers: Turtle Films (Delhi), Singh Productions (Chandigarh), The Family SRL (Italy)
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

Licensed Song: Tum Hi Ho Bandhu
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
Lyricist: Irshad Kamil
Singers: Neeraj Shridhar and Kavita Seth
Label: Sony Music Entertainment India

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maddockfilms/
Twitter: https://x.com/MaddockFilms
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms
Threads: https://www.threads.net/@maddockfilms

bn.title: ধামাল 4 ট্রেলার • প্রতিক্রিয়া
bn.description:
#ধামাল৪ #দ্যপিজে #পিজেএক্সপ্লেইনড

আমার সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া হ্যান্ডেলগুলো: 
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
টুইটার: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
স্ন্যাপচ্যাট: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

থ্রেডস: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
ফেসবুক: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

thePJ হলো একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমার বিষয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই উদ্দেশ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

snippet.title: Salala Karnali | Pramod Kharel | Pramod & Parampara | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
A soulful tribute to the beauty of Karnali, "Salala Karnali" brings together the timeless voice of Pramod Kharel with the words and music of Suraj Thapa. Shot amid the breathtaking landscapes of Jumla, this song is a heartfelt celebration of love, land, and the spirit of the Karnali region.

🎵 SONG: Salala Karnali

snippet.title: Naino Ne Baandhi - Lyrical | Gold | Akshay Kumar | Mouni Roy | Arko | Yasser Desai
snippet.description:
Song Name - Naino Ne Baandhi - Arko ft Yasser Desai
Movie - Gold
Vocals - Yasser Desai
Music and Lyrics - Arko
Programming & Arrangement - Aditya Dev
Guitars (Acoustic, Electric, Nylon) - Krishna Pradhan
Recorded at AMV studios by Rahul Sharma
Mix - Aditya Dev
Master - Eric Pillai
Choreographer - Rekha Chinni Prakash
DOP - Álvaro Gutiérrez AEC
Story - Reema Kagti and Rajesh Devraj
Producers - Ritesh Sidhwani and Farhan Akhtar
Written and Directed by Reema Kagti

Gold is a historical sports drama inspired by India’s first Olympic gold medal. The film traces the “golden era” of Indian hockey through the journey of Tapan Das, a young assistant manager in 1936, who dreams of playing for an independent nation.

#GoldSongs #AkshayKumarSongs #ArkoSongs #NewHindiSongs

snippet.title: SlumDog: 33 Temple Road-Official Teaser (Hindi) | Vijay Sethupathi, Tabu, Samyuktha | Puri Jagannadh
snippet.description:
Watch SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser - Hindi!

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures. 

Cast: Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi, Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay Kumar, VTV Ganesh, Brahmaji and Others.

Technical Crew:
Writer & Director: Puri Jagannadh
Producers: Puri Jagannadh, Charmme Kaur, JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla
Presents: Charmme Kaur
Banner: Puri Connects
CEO: Vishu Reddy
Music: Harshavardhan Rameshwar
Cinematographer: Sam K Naidu
Editor: Santosh Noozilla
Art Directors: Ashish Teja & Jonny Shaik
Co-Director: Jiten Sharmaa
Marketing: Haashtag Media

snippet.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Trailer | Varun | Mrunal | Pooja | David | In Cinemas 5th June 2026
snippet.description:

Presenting the Trailer of Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai starring Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur & Pooja Hegde, directed by David Dhawan.
A perfect mix of comedy, love, confusion & family drama awaits you on the big screen! ❤️🔥

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

Connect with #HeartOfTheBeast

bn.title: ধুরন্ধরের পর এই মহাবিশ্বের কী হবে: আলফা টিজার ফাঁস
bn.description:
🔥 আলফা টিজার প্রতিক্রিয়া ও পর্যালোচনা | আলিয়া ভাট | শারভারি | অনিল কাপুর | ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্স 🔥

এই ভিডিওতে, আমি কিংবদন্তী ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের আলিয়া ভাট, শারভারি এবং অনিল কাপুর অভিনীত বহু প্রতীক্ষিত 'আলফা' টিজারের উপর আমার অকপট প্রতিক্রিয়া এবং বিস্তারিত পর্যালোচনা তুলে ধরেছি। 🎬

টিজারটি বেশ উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ, অ্যাকশন-ভরা এবং একটি শক্তিশালী নারী-প্রধান স্পাই থ্রিলারের প্রতিশ্রুতি দিচ্ছে। এই প্রতিক্রিয়া ভিডিওতে, আমরা টিজারটি বিশ্লেষণ করেছি এবং এর অ্যাকশন সিকোয়েন্স, অভিনয়, গল্পের ইঙ্গিত, ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের সংযোগ, লুকানো বিবরণ এবং ভক্তরা সিনেমাটি থেকে কী আশা করতে পারেন, তা নিয়ে আলোচনা করেছি।

💥 আলফা কি ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের পরবর্তী ব্লকবাস্টার হতে চলেছে? 💥 একজন গুপ্তচর হিসেবে আলিয়া ভাটকে কেমন লাগছে? 💥 শারভারি এবং অনিল কাপুর কী চরিত্রে অভিনয় করবেন? 💥 টিজার বিশ্লেষণ, ইস্টার এগস ও ফ্যান থিওরি!

শেষ পর্যন্ত দেখুন এবং কমেন্টে আপনার মতামত জানান। আরও রিঅ্যাকশন, রিভিউ এবং বিনোদনমূলক কন্টেন্টের জন্য লাইক, শেয়ার ও সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে ভুলবেন না।

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Akshay & IP
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai In Cinemas Now

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai In Cinemas Now

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)

Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal

Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP

Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)

Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik

Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: Ucha Lamba Kad Forever | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar | Disha Patani | Vikram M | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting Ucha Lamba Kad Forever, the latest song from Welcome To The Jungle ❤️🎶 The melody that became everyone’s favourite is back to make you sing, dance, and vibe all over again. Bringing back the charm, nostalgia, and the magic of a song that has lived in playlists and hearts for years.

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

#UchaLambaKadForever #WelcomeToTheJungle #AkshayKumar #DishaPatani #BollywoodSong #NewMusic #BollywoodMusic  #JungleeMusic  #DanceSong

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

snippet.title: Sangai Jiune  | Nawaraj Thapa Magar & Melina Rai | New Nepali Song 2026 | Official Video

snippet.title: The Elements | Thula Thula Sahar (EL3 Rendition)
snippet.description:
EL3 Renditions 

We revisit these stories after 10 years.. Some thing have changed, some things have not. In the mists of Tanahu . 

Video by : 
Sujan Bahadur Basnet 
Siddhartha Shakya (Sid)
Prabish Newa

Audio Recorded at : Elements HQ 
Produced by : Brihat Pahari | Raunaq Singh Adhikari
                         PaintBox Studios 


Lyrics:
thula thula sahar
thulai soch hola
beglai cha najar
tara sakkincha hola

thula thula mahal
akashai chekkincha hola
sararara motor ma kudincha hola

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

hawa le choyo
beglai lagyo sparsha 
khusi khojna nai
paila sardo raicha

auna ta mann thiyena 
mero baani chalan bhindai
paristhiti testai 
aye sabai nata uchindai

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

snippet.title: VEK X Ashira Shah - Ghumna Jauna (Prod. by pozod)
snippet.description:
VEK and Ashira Shah come together for a collaboration for the first time on "Ghumna Jauna", an Afro-inspired track with a feel-good spirit vibe.

Written, composed and performed by VEK and Ashira Shah
Prod. by pozod
Production Manager: Celine Prajapati, SNJV, Beten Shrestha
Dance Choreography: Ojaswi Thapa and Stuti
MUA: Ashmita R Magar and Pratima Gurung
Lights: Baba dai and team
DOP: Sayun Shakya and storenutter
Directed and edited by storenutter

Venue Partner: Keg and Cork

Clothing Partner: Basemark and Latido

Special Thanks to Asif Shah, Nasira Shah, Nixdii, Sanju Bajracharya, Samriddhi KC

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Bhawana (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Bhawana explores the inner struggles of the mind, feelings of anxiety, loneliness and self-doubt. It emphasises the importance of self-compassion, seeking support, and allowing space to heal affirming that even in moments of darkness, recovery and inner peace are possible, when help is provided for.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocal, Guitar, Backing Vocals
Pranai Gurung - Guitars
Rahul Rai - Bass
Achint Khare - Keys, Organ
Aman Singh Rathore - Drums

Lyrics, Composition and Arrangement by Bipul Chettri
Recorded by Anindo Bose
Mixed and Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

VIDEO
Starring - Bishakha Thapa
Performers - Endo Mrinal, Deo Dorjay Yolmo

Directed by - Gundruk
Director of Photography - Vashistha Pradhan
Executive Producer - Mitali Solanki

Assistant Director - Thushar Shivam
Assistant Camera - Mrinal Sharma

Edited by - Dishant & Vazzu

Co-Producer - Vazzu

Production Design - Mitali, Thushar, Lochana
Art Direction - Thushar, Mitali, Dishant

Extras - Akshara, Prakruthi, Thushar, Mrinal

It emphasises the importance of self-compassion, seeking support, and allowing space to heal affirming that even in moments of darkness, recovery and inner peace are possible, when help is provided for.

Bipul Chettri - Vocal, Guitar, Backing Vocals

snippet.description:
Presenting the full video of “𝐏𝐡𝐢𝐫 𝐁𝐡𝐢 𝐓𝐮𝐦𝐤𝐨 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐚𝐡𝐮𝐧𝐠𝐚” 💖 from Half Girlfriend, beautifully sung by Arijit Singh & Shashaa Tirupati.

𝐌𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐞: Half Girlfriend

𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜: Mithoon
𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐭: Manoj Muntashir.
🎬 𝐂𝐚𝐬𝐭: Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor
🏢 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐇𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞: Balaji Motion Pictures
🎥 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐬: Shobha Kapoor, Ekta Kapoor, Mohit Suri & Chetan Bhagat

snippet.title: Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan
snippet.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.


Audio Credits

Lyrics
Hark Saud

Vocal & Music
Sujan Chapagain

Poem
Pallawib

Music Producer/Mixing/Mastering
Kobid Bazra

Strings Orchestration and Recordings
Bikesh Bazra

Tabla
Jagannath Dhaugoda

Keys
Anish (Dotted Nose)

Flute
Ratna BK 

Sarangi
Prince Nepali

Guitars
KobidBazra
Bikesh Bazra
Sanjeev Baraili

Violin
Roshna Shakya
Roman Budhathoki

Cello
Nishad Shrestha
Drums
Bikesh Bazra 

Back Vocals
Kriti Nepali

Recording Engineer
Kobid Bazra
Bikesh Bazra 

Studio Production Manager
Kriti Nepali

Music Produced at 
Bajra Creation Records

Special Thanks
Sumit Pathak

And the people of Chitwan.

snippet.title: Oasis Thapa - Sakey | सके [ Official Music Video ]
snippet.description:
Hi! bhanna ta dherai kura bhanna man cha tara kaa bata po suru garney... A song written 3 years ago with 3 different version each year. Ek point ma ta laageko thyo hyaa ettikai haaldinchu ma kina etro mehenat gariraachu bhanera tara khai man le namaanney. Ajjai pugena, yo bhayena, tyo bhayena, yo ajjai better garna sakchu, I can polish this a lot more bhanney soch le 3 barsa laagyo yo geet release garna. I guess this urge to serve quality everytime is a gift and a curse but so far I'm super satisfied with the end craft. The whole entire team was teaming. Yesai sndarva ma I hope I get to release my songs more consistently which I've written for over 4 years. Some old and some recent. Life been nerfing me so much I'm just discovering esto ni hudo raicha bhanera. I be like f'k yeah new year new energy and motivation to do more and then every year life be like here hold this new L for now. K sikaauna khojeko ni tha chaina. Just weird. There has been a few blessings I've received which I'm super grateful for though. There's this strong sense to protect that unlike anything. So, yeah a little life update but I really hope I can keep serving for now. See you guys on the next one.

Audio Link:
https://open.spotify.com/track/5P5m2swluasZrMNIsRShw4?si=96POEiDcR6yCDnBkxDz10Q

------------------------------------------
Lyrics:

Sakey ta ma dine thiye
Bache kuche ka sara
Mero Maya timi lai
Mero Maya timi lai

Sochina kahilei timrai barey
Timrai aakhaa kai pareli le jhukkyaaula
Todera jodidai
Dhadkera rokidai
Tadpera jogidai
Sambhaalula

Jhutho aashaa jhutho sapanaa
lai parkhera
Adhuro chahaanaa apuraa bahaanaa 
lai samjhera

Baaki rahey 
Nisaasiyeko saasai jaleyra 
Bhymari jhai aago salki rahey
Chaati chhiya chhiya kharaani bhaye

Sakey ta ma diney thiye
Bachekuchey ka saaraa
Mero maya timi lai
Mero maya timi lai

Timi lai timi lai....... 

Doman bho mutu mero dui bhaagai anidho
Badliyo mausam mero ujeli dhaakiyo
Farkiyo baadal kaalo sang jhari orli
Sakhaapai mero haal chaalai bharam mai
Baache jhai bhaako cha maya
Kun kissa metaaye mandir kun jalaayera
Milcha aanandi yahaa? 

Sakey ta sakey ta
Sakey ta ma
Sakey ta sakey ta
Sakey ta ma

-------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to The Booyah Awards 2026, the biggest celebration of the Free Fire MAX community.

After a year of clutch Booyahs, viral moments, unforgettable streams, and incredible content, it's time to crown the creators, players, and personalities who defined the year. But with new challengers rising every day, the question remains:

🔥 Are the legends still on top?

Join us for an evening packed with awards, entertainment, special appearances, and the biggest names in Free Fire MAX.

Who will take home the glory? 

#FreeFireMAX #Booyah

snippet.title: Waka Waka - Esto es Africa (sub. español + lyrics) Canción Oficial de la Copa Mundial Sudáfrica 2010
snippet.description:
📀 Canción: Waka Waka (Esto es África)
📼 Artista: Shakira

⏩ Escucha al artista original y apóyalo en sus redes oficiales:
• 📺 YouTube: /@Shakira 

🎥 Video oficial:
  https://youtu.be/dzsuE5ugxf4?si=IWs2MxZRCa5_8h-g 
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🕹️ Si te gustó este video, suscríbete para no perderte nuevas joyas de todos los tiempos:
📺  www.youtube.com/@SaboraManzana  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Letra:
Llegó el momento
Caen las murallas
Va a comenzar la única justa de las batallas

No duele el golpe
No existe el miedo
Quítate el polvo, ponte de pie y vuelves al ruedo

Y la presión se siente
Espera en ti tu gente

Ahora vamos por todo
Y te acompaña la suerte
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Tsamina mina, eh, eh
Waka waka, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Oye a tu Dios y
No estarás solo
Llegaste aquí para brillar, lo tienes todo

La hora se acerca
Es el momento
Vas a ganar cada batalla, ya lo presiento

Hay que empezar de cero
Para tocar el cielo

Ahora vamos por todo
Y todos vamos por ellos

#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस्

snippet.title: Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho…
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the…
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

“Bhul Jana”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

agar sukoon mile…
to hume bhul jana…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

en-IN.title: Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
en-IN.description:
Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho…
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the…
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

“Bhul Jana”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

agar sukoon mile…
to hume bhul jana…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

bn.title: আমি Blox Fruit-এ অবৈধ মিথ পরীক্ষা করেছি পর্ব ৩
bn.description:
আমি ব্লক্স ফ্রুটে অবৈধ মিথ পরীক্ষা করেছি পর্ব ৩
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
📱 আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন: 
গিভঅ্যাওয়ে এবং সাশ্রয়ী মূল্যের পোশাকের জন্য আমার রোবলক্স কমিউনিটিতে যোগ দিন 
= https://www.roblox.com/communities/415245056/SujalisLive#!/about
২য় চ্যানেল =https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHEYPkg83NwMWahJzyWbWTQ
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/sujal_mundlia/ 
ডিসকর্ড: https://discord.gg/XtavTBQSUk
রোবলক্স প্রোফাইল: https://www.roblox.com/users/5080383735/profile
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
🎮 চ্যানেল সম্পর্কে: 
সুজালিসলাইভ একটি হিন্দি গেমিং চ্যানেল, যেখানে আমি রোবলক্সের উপর বিনোদনমূলক এবং গল্প-নির্ভর ভিডিও আপলোড করি। এই মুহূর্তে, আমি **রোবলক্স ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস**-এর উপর মনোযোগ দিচ্ছি — এটি রোবলক্সের অন্যতম জনপ্রিয় ওয়ান পিস-অনুপ্রাণিত একটি গেম, যেখানে আপনি বসদের সাথে লড়াই করেন, লেভেল আপ করেন এবং সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী খেলোয়াড় হয়ে ওঠেন। 

আপনি নতুন বা অভিজ্ঞ, যাই হোন না কেন, এখানে আপনি মজার মুহূর্ত, গ্রাইন্ডিং টিপস এবং দুর্দান্ত সব লড়াই খুঁজে পাবেন — সবই হিংলাশে। জিটিএ ৬ এবং তার পরবর্তী গেমগুলোর জন্য একটি অনুগত গেমিং দর্শক তৈরি করার এই যাত্রায় আমার সাথে যোগ দিন!

🎨 থাম্বনেইল তৈরি করেছেন: 1035452937671024700 atharvartist7 ( ডিসকর্ড )

snippet.title: BABYMONSTER - 'SUGAR HONEY ICE TEA' M/V
snippet.description:

snippet.title: [NP] FFMAI 2026 Summer | South Asia Play-Ins Day 2 | Group B - C
snippet.description:
Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Summer continues with the South Asia Play-Ins, featuring top teams from India, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Pakistan.

Day 2 of SA Play-Ins: GROUP B vs GROUP C

The top 8 teams from SA Play-Ins will qualify to the Main Event on June 18

Group B
♦ GodLike Esports (IN)
♦ Nebula Esports (IN)
♦ Revenant XSpark (IN)
♦ Straw Hats (BD)
♦ Flame Esports (BD)
♦ Hotshot Esports (PK)

Group C
♦ Raiders United (IN)
♦ iQOO Total Gaming (IN)
♦ No Rules (BD)
♦ Extreme EX (BD)
♦ Tonde Nepal Esports (NP)
♦ Total Winner (PK)

Schedule 📋
📅 SA Play-Ins - June 12, 13, 14
📅 Main Event Group Stage - June 18, 19, 20
📅 Grand Finals - June 21

Who will be the champion of Asia? Who will be Crowned By Fire?

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #CrownedByFire

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - stupid song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq


Lyrics

New York City’s never looked so blue
My friends are smoking blunts in the bathroom
They say that honest love
Is a cage that makes you feel free
And all the girls at this party are so cool
That’s never been a thing that I could do
But I can’t help but imagine
What you say when you speak with me

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Walking through the park with my head high
Past all the college girls and the drunk guys
And if there is a God
He’s the bond that’s between us two
Seven nights alone and a skipped meal
I’m sleeping in my dress and my high heels
And I’m too shy to say what I see
When I dream of you
When I dream of you

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Every night like the one before
Dream of you from like 1 to 4
Positively and truly sure
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With the hand on my heart I swore
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With a hand on my heart I swore

I’m going crazy
I’m going mad
I want you baby so bad

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong

And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

snippet.title: Adhuro Sapana - Salon&TheYubal | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Adhuro Sapana
Performed by: Salon Bal Tamang

“Adhuro Sapana” is an emotional song about love, trust, and betrayal. It tells the story of a boy who builds his dreams around a girl, only to be left heartbroken when she betrays him. In the end, all his dreams remain incomplete, reflecting the pain of broken trust and unfinished love.

Audio Credits
 • Vocal / Lyrics / Composition: Salon Bal Tamang

https://www.instagram.com/salon_tmg314

 • Mix / Master / Produced By: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Production)

https://www.instagram.com/omniphonics.studio

snippet.title: EVIL GRANDMA Gave Kavi & Misri POISON COOKIES! 😨 Roblox
snippet.description:
Kavi & Misri STUCK With EVIL GRANDMA In Roblox! 😱 (Escape Evil Grandma) | EVIL GRANDMA Gave Kavi & Misri POISON COOKIES! 😨🍪 | Escape Evil Grandma Roblox Gameplay 🤧😱

Today Kavi and Misri are trapped inside Escape Evil Grandma in Roblox! Evil Grandma has gone crazy and is making disgusting cookies! 🍪😱 We must solve obstacles, escape dangerous traps, and run away before Grandma catches us!

Can we escape Evil Grandma's house and survive this crazy Roblox adventure? Watch till the end to find out!

snippet.title: SADI SUN - Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa | Harsh Nussi | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Sadi Sun featuring Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa.

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Harsh Nussi

Associated Brands :-

UPES University (https://www.upes.ac.in/)
Optima Insurance Brokers Private Limited (https://optima.co.in/)

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

Follow Ekdev through Chitwan as he experiences love, romance, and adventure in the most carefree way. Where reality and dreams merge into moments that change everything.

snippet.title: [ WATCHPARTY ] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | LAST DAY
snippet.description:
➡️ Membership Link: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC3IAnSKHhS1CFcxkmHUfFFw/join

➡️ Nepali Superchat Link: 
https://cr8.rs/@rashmay_casts
( This Will display your Message & Amount you donated on the Screen )

➡️ Follow me On instagram: 
https://www.instagram.com/rashmay_/

➡️ Join "OP" Instagram Broadcast Channel:
https://www.instagram.com/channel/AbZ5dS8d0aiI85Vk/

________________________________________________________________________________

2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 ko Main Event ab aafno charam binduma pugisakeko chha – Grand Finals!

Duniya bharika 10 lakh bhanda badhi kheladiharu yo manchma pugna chahanthe. Tara keval thorai teamharule matra aafno sip, mehenat ra nirantar pradarshan dwara yo sthaan hasil gareka chhan. 16 team, 2 din, ra eutai champion. Yo rosterma raheka harek teamle aafno thau sangharsha ra mehenat bata kamai gareko ho. Kasaiko lagi sajilo bato thiyena, kasaiko lagi upahar thiyena. Yaha keval sabai bhanda uttam teamharu champion banna ko lagi aamne-saamne hunechhan.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage
• 32 team 16–16 team ko 2 samuha ma vibhajit
• Kul 2 din (pratyek samuha ko lagi 1 din)
• Samagra Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Samagra Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Samagra Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage
• Samagra Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Samagra Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals
• 16 team — 2 din, pratyek din 6 match

🔥 SMASH RULE (Day 2 ma lagu hunechha)

SMASH Rule trophy jitne sabai bhanda romanchak tarika ho. Tara kasari?

• Day 1 ko Overall Ranking #1 team ko point +10 = Match Point Threshold
• Day 2 ma threshold pura garepachi arko match jitnuparcha title jitna
• Yadi kunai team le SMASH pura garna saken bhane, sabai bhanda dherai overall point bhayeko team vijeta hunchha

🗓 Tournament Talika

• Group Stage: June 2–3
• Survival Stage: June 4
• Grand Finals: June 6–7

💰 Kul Prize Pool: $500,000

🏅 Grand Final Teams:
4T
721
Aur
BOOM
BTR
EA
FL
FURIA
GEEK
goat
GSTR
HORAA
PNDM
S2G
TT
ULF.
🗺 Aajako Map Rotation
• Match 1: Rondo
• Match 2: Erangel
• Match 3: Erangel
• Match 4: Erangel
• Match 5: Miramar
• Match 6: Miramar

📍 Venue: Tennis Indoor Stadium Senayan

snippet.title: Fears to Fathom - Scratch Creek
snippet.description:
A new episode of fears to fathom but this time it's a co-op adventure so my brother is joining in for the adventure where we play as a couple who took really bad decisions and ended up almost getting kidnapped. 
Also the jumpscare at 24:30 was very loud while playing, me going to the desktop messed up the volume for that moment so it looks like it was very low and not scary but trust me, it was scary as hell lol. The volume is just low in the video for that moment.

snippet.title: Tera Fitoor Jab Se Chadh Gaya Re - Lyrics | Arijit Singh | Himesh Reshammiya | Evergreen Love Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Tera Fitoor
Movie: Genius
Singer: Arijit Singh
Music: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist: Kumaar

Lyrics:
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Tu Jo Mere Sang Chalne Lage
Toh Meri Raahe Dhadakne Lage
Dekhun Jo Na Ek Pal Main Tumhe
Toh Meri Baahein Tadapne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Haathon Se, Lakeere Yehi Kehti Hai
Ke Zindagi Jo Hai Meri, Tujhi Mein Ab Rehti Hai

Labon Pe Likhi Hai Mere Dil Ki Khwahish,
Lafzon Mein Kaise Main Bataaun
Ek Tujhko Hi Paane Ki Khatir,
Sab Se Juda Main Ho Jaaun

Kal Tak Maine Jo Bhi Khwaab The Dekhe
Tujh Mein Woh Dikhne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Saanson Ke Kinaare Bade Tanha The,
Tu Aake Inhein Chhu Le Bas 
Yehi To Mere Armaan The

Saari Duniya Se Mujhe Kya Lena Hai,
Bas Tujhko Hi Pehchaanu
Mujhko Na Meri Ab Khabar Ho Koi,
Tujhse Hi Khud Ko Main Jaanu

Raatein Nahi Kat Ti Bechain Se Hoke,
Din Bhi Guzarne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

snippet.title: Live Lok Dohori Nepali | "मायालुको बोली" Mayaluko Boli - Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang
snippet.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Mayaluko Boli" By Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang , brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

localized.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Mayaluko Boli" By Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang , brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

Chahat Ko Tum Zinda Rakhna, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.

pa.title: ਮੈਂ ਜੈਕ ਨਾਲ ਪਾਲਵਰਲਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਬੌਸ ਨੂੰ ਹਰਾਇਆ 😱
pa.description:
ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ
🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੋਵੇਗੀ, ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੈ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ। 

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

hi.description:
नए वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें
🤗 मुझे इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

आशा है आपको वीडियो पसंद आया होगा। अगर पसंद आया तो कृपया लाइक और शेयर करें।

कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण: आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति, शिक्षा और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति दी गई है।

उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत एक ऐसा उपयोग है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकता है।

te.title: నేను JACKతో PALWORLDలో మొదటి బాస్‌ని ఓడించాను 😱
te.description:
కొత్త వీడియోల కోసం దయచేసి సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేసుకోండి

🤗 నన్ను ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో ఫాలో అవ్వండి: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చిందని ఆశిస్తున్నాను, ఒకవేళ నచ్చితే, దయచేసి వీడియోను లైక్ చేసి, షేర్ చేయండి.

1976 కాపీరైట్ చట్టంలోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్యానం, వార్తా నివేదన, బోధన, పాండిత్యం, విద్య మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన వినియోగం"కు అనుమతి ఇవ్వబడింది.

న్యాయమైన వినియోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక వినియోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

bn.title: আমি জ্যাকের সাথে পালওয়ার্ল্ড (Palworld)-এর প্রথম বসকে পরাজিত করেছি 😱
bn.description:
নতুন ভিডিওর জন্য অনুগ্রহ করে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন
🤗 আমাকে ইনস্টাগ্রামে ফলো করুন: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে। যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে, তবে অনুগ্রহ করে ভিডিওটি লাইক ও শেয়ার করুন।

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

Die faire Nutzung ist eine durch das Urheberrecht gestattete Nutzung, die andernfalls eine Urheberrechtsverletzung darstellen könnte.

Pernyataan Penafian Hak Cipta berdasarkan pasal 107 Undang-Undang Hak Cipta tahun 1976, izin diberikan untuk “penggunaan wajar” untuk tujuan seperti kritik, komentar, pelaporan berita, pengajaran, beasiswa, pendidikan, dan penelitian.

Penggunaan wajar adalah penggunaan yang diizinkan oleh undang-undang hak cipta yang mungkin dianggap melanggar hak cipta.

ml.title: JACK-നൊപ്പം PALWORLD-ലെ ആദ്യ ബോസിനെ ഞാൻ തോൽപ്പിച്ചു 😱
ml.description:
പുതിയ വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക
🤗 ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാമിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

വീഡിയോ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടെങ്കിൽ നിങ്ങൾ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടുവെന്ന് ഞാൻ പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നു, ദയവായി വീഡിയോ ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്‌ത് പങ്കിടുക. 

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

ta.title: நான் JACK உடன் சேர்ந்து PALWORLD-இன் முதல் பாஸை தோற்கடித்துவிட்டேன் 😱
ta.description:
புதிய வீடியோக்களுக்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்
🤗 இன்ஸ்டாகிராமில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்புரை: விமர்சனம், கருத்துரை, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்விப் புலமை, கல்வி மற்றும் ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary
